description: Bifolium from an account book. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: 11th or 12th century. Mentions mainly Muslim business partners such as Abū Ḥafṣ ʿUmar b. Muḥammad and (possibly his brother) Abū l-Qāsim; Ibn Abū Shākir; Abū Bakr b. Badīs; ʿAbdallāh b. Zīrī. Sums are large: 300 dinars, 150 dinars, 25 dinars. Also mentions Abū Yaʿqūb and various quantities of maqṭaʿ cloths. (Information from Goitein’s index card)
description_he: דו-דף מפנקס חשבונות ביהודית-ערבית; המאה ה-11 או ה-12; שותפים עסקיים מוסלמים; סכומים גדולים: 300 ו-150 ו-25 דינרים; כמויות בד מקטע
